en: I'm ready. There's Waldo!
ko: 준비됐어요. 월리 찾았다!

en: I think I'm gonna win the costume contest.
ko: 나 코스튬 대회 우승할 것 같아.

en: Hey, now, honey, it's not important if you win. It's just for fun. Picture.
ko: 자기야, 이기는 게 중요한 게 아니야. 그냥 재미로 하는 거지. 사진.

en: But it's more fun if you win. No offense, Daddy.
ko: 근데 이기면 더 재밌잖아. 아빠한테 미안하지만.

en: You know, Lily's been letting me know recently that she's feeling neglected.
ko: 있잖아, 릴리가 요즘 자기가 소외받고 있다고 얘기해.

en: I think it's because of all my football stuff.
ko: 내 풋볼 때문인 것 같아.

en: That's why I went all out on her costume.
ko: 그래서 릴리 코스튬에 진짜 공을 들였어.

en: Look how incredibly accurate it is. Where is that little guy?
ko: 봐봐 얼마나 정확한지. 우리 꼬마 어디 갔지?

en: Come on, come to me. Come on. Here you go. Here you go.
ko: 이리 와, 나한테 와. 자, 여기. 여기.

en: No matter how long he stares at it,
ko: 아무리 오래 쳐다봐도,

en: Cam cannot find Waldo. It's crazy.
ko: 캠은 월리를 못 찾아. 진짜 미쳤어.

en: Oh, what once he pointed to a barber pole
ko: 한번은 이발소 기둥을 가리키길래

en: and we just gave it to him.
ko: 그냥 맞다고 해줬어.

en: Where is the little guy? It's right there.
ko: 그 꼬마 어디 있지? 바로 거기 있잖아.

en: How do you find it?
ko: 어떻게 찾는 거야?

en: Let's try these.
ko: 이것 좀 써보자.

en: OK, on three, say arg.
ko: 좋아, 셋 하면, '아르' 해.

en: One, two, three. Arg. Oh, that's great. Thank you.
ko: 하나, 둘, 셋. 아르. 오, 잘 나왔다. 고마워요.

en: And how are you two related? You know what?
ko: 두 분은 어떤 관계세요? 있잖아요?

en: Gay or straight, there's no wrong way to make a family. So. OK, down girl.
ko: 게이든 아니든, 가족을 이루는 데 틀린 방법은 없어요. 그러니까. 됐고, 진정해.

en: I meant, how are your costumes related?
ko: 코스튬이 어떻게 연관되냐고 물은 건데요.

en: It's a parent-child costume contest. It is?
ko: 부모-자녀 코스튬 대회예요. 그래?

en: It was all clearly stated on the flyer. There was a flyer? I gave it to you, Daddy.
ko: 전단지에 다 써 있었잖아요. 전단지가 있었어? 아빠한테 줬잖아.

en: I knew your costume was all wrong. Oh, OK. Hey, don't panic. There's plenty of time before the parade.
ko: 아빠 코스튬이 다 틀렸다니까. 아, 알겠어. 당황하지 마. 퍼레이드 전에 시간 많아.

en: Is there another character in Where's Waldo? Wizard Whitebeard. OK.
Well that be fun I haven gone out with a white beard since I took my cousin Sally to the prom All right I be back as soon as I can Lily explain Daddy joke Made it in the nick of time
All right, let's get this parade started while I'm still just 4,000 years old.
You do know the parade's not until after school, right? What? No.
I can't stay that long. I have football practice.
Oh, my God, I have to tell Lily. She's going to be devastated. Oh, no.
Where's Waldo?
Since when has the parade been after school?
Since always. It was on the flyer.
How big was this flyer?
Oh, so this is how we call each other now?
Mitchell, I have a costume emergency.
Just wear it with confidence, Cam. I'm sure you look great. No, I can't find Lily.
Um, oh, okay, found her.
By the trash can next to the big kid dressed like a hobo. Oh, you did it. I don't think that's a kid. I should probably tell a grown-up.
Lily, honey, listen. Daddy can't stay for the parade. But you promised.
No, I know I did, but it starts later than I thought, and I have to get to...
Football practice. It's fine. Just go. No, Lily, wait!
No, she's gone forever.
